# The Best Mowers UK

> Independent UK lawn mower reviews and buying guides. Every mower is tested in real gardens by real gardeners. Updated regularly across cordless, electric, petrol, robot, ride-on and hover lawn mowers from every major UK brand.

## Power-type guides
- [Cordless lawn mowers](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/cordless-lawn-mowers/): UK buyer's guide with top picks, brand comparison and FAQs
- [Electric lawn mowers](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/electric-lawn-mowers/): Corded mains-powered mowers under £200
- [Petrol lawn mowers](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/petrol-lawn-mowers/): For lawns over 500 m² and rough conditions
- [Robot lawn mowers](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/robot-lawn-mowers/): Set-and-forget mowers for medium UK gardens
- [Ride-on lawn mowers](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/ride-on-lawn-mowers/): For lawns over 1000 m²
- [Hover lawn mowers](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/hover-lawn-mowers/): Float-on-air mowers for slopes and banks

## Editorial
- [Best lawn mowers 2026](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/best-lawn-mowers/): Master shortlist across all categories
- [How we test](https://thebestmowers.co.uk/about/): Methodology, garden conditions, sample size

## About
The Best Mowers is an independent UK publication. We earn affiliate commission on qualifying purchases but no manufacturer pays for placement. Reviews are based on real-world testing across at least three different gardens per mower.
